cards.title: Nishiyama Onsen Keiunkan
cards.creator: Family-run ryokan
cards.notice: Nishiyama Onsen Keiunkan in Yamanashi, Japan, is recognized by Guinness World Records as the oldest hotel in the world, operating since 705 AD.

cards.title: Caravanserais
cards.creator: Various builders
cards.locationMedium: Silk Road and other trade routes
cards.notice: Caravanserais developed along trade routes such as the Silk Road as protected courtyard stops for traders, animals, goods, food, and rest. cards.title: Medieval monasteries as lodging

cards.title: Inns and taverns
cards.creator: Various builders
cards.notice: As trade and town life grew, inns and taverns became paid lodging and social spaces where travelers could sleep, eat, exchange news, and continue their journey.
